headline: 5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From Airbnb’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Airbnb’s Q1 results were well received by the market, reflecting strong execution on product innovation and international expansion initiatives. Management credited the company’s growth to increased guest adoption of features like Reserve Now, Pay Later and improvements in the app and host tools. CEO Brian Chesky emphasized that the company’s tailored approach to key markets—such as Brazil, India, and Japan—helped accelerate first-time bookings and drove a faster rate of nights and experiences b
